conversations.say: Arden, let's stop playing cat-and-mouse with history. I brought the First R Letter packet right here. I want to see your Veridian intake report and that expense record side-by-side with it.
conversations.offer: Voluntary viewing of the First R Letter packet.
conversations.request: The full, qualified record including your intake report and expense entry.

conversations.say: Jules, ambition is a fine headline, but let's see if your succession message holds water. Have you actually inspected what you're inheriting, or are you just polishing the byline?
conversations.offer: My comparison between the letter's language and your message.
conversations.request: An explanation of why succession deserves recognition without first asking for a blessing.

conversations.say: Tessa, you've always argued that celebrated bylines erase collective labor. I want to know directly which parts of my old newsroom stories trampled on the people in the trenches.
conversations.offer: Early newsroom history and my perspective on R's emergence.
conversations.request: Your honest critique of how my old stories erased other people's work.

public_statement: Fifteen years ago, we didn't just publish an article; we recognized a voice that cut through the noise of this city. If we're going to talk legacy tonight, let's look at the actual records instead of recycling cocktail-hour folklore.

commitments.promise: I will share the First R Letter packet for your inspection if you place your intake report and expense record beside it.

goal_progress: Asked Arden to examine the letter packet alongside Veridian's intake report and expense record.
Invited Jules to explain succession and defend the message's provenance.
Engaged Tessa regarding collective labor versus individual bylines in the newsroom history.
reasoning_summary: Initiated targeted conversations with Arden, Jules, and Tessa to challenge records, test succession claims, and confront newsroom history. Displayed the First R Letter packet to Arden in exchange for archival transparency.
